data.name: modLoaderInfoText.Text
data.value:
The mod loader is the system in-charge of injecting mods into Gorilla Tag.
BepInEx is the traditional and default choice as it has been the default mod loader for the Gorilla Tag Modding Group since 2021.
MelonLoader is a substitute for BepInEx that hasn't been used as long, but promises better performance in comparsion to BepInEx.
